REDMIST-STRENGTH_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Strength Next Turn
REDMIST-STRENGTH_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, gain {Amount} Strength.
REDMIST-STRENGTH_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your next turn, gain {Amount} Strength.

REDMIST-BLEED_POWER.title: Bleed
REDMIST-PARTIAL_EGO_POWER.title: Partial EGO
REDMIST-PARTIAL_EGO_POWER.description: Gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity. Whenever an Attack kills an enemy, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity. At the start of your turn, if you dealt less than 10 unblocked damage last turn, lose this Power and all stats granted by it.
REDMIST-PARTIAL_EGO_POWER.smartDescripti: Gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity. Whenever an Attack kills an enemy, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity. At the start of your turn, if you dealt less than 10 unblocked damage last turn, lose this Power and all stats granted by it.
REDMIST-SPEED_POWER.title: Speed
REDMIST-SPEED_POWER.description: Whenever you play an Agile card, repeat its effect {Amount} extra times.
REDMIST-SPEED_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play an Agile card, repeat its effect {Amount} extra times.
REDMIST-INSTINCTS_POWER.title: Instincts
REDMIST-INSTINCTS_POWER.description: Heal {Amount} HP every time you cause damage
REDMIST-INSTINCTS_POWER.smartDescription: Heal {Amount} HP every time you cause damage
